---
title: "Welcome"
description: "Course notes and writing by Michel Kadoch."
listing:
  - id: listing-home
    contents: notes
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 5
    fields: [title, description, date]
---

Welcome to my website. This is the home page.


## Recent Notes

The list below fills in automatically from the `notes/` folder.

::: {#listing-home}
:::
